name: book-capture
description: Capture books from Mac Kindle, Apple Books, Kindle Cloud Reader, or PDF — then OCR and generate structured Obsidian Markdown

commands.capture: Full pipeline: platform selection → screenshot capture → OCR → structured Markdown
commands.kindle: Capture from Mac Kindle app → OCR → structured Markdown
commands.books: Capture from Apple Books app → OCR → structured Markdown
commands.cloud: Capture from Kindle Cloud Reader (browser) → OCR → structured Markdown
commands.pdf: Capture from PDF file → OCR → structured Markdown
commands.ocr: Run OCR on existing page captures (Vision + agent re-reading)
commands.generate: Generate structured Markdown from existing OCR text (requires raw_text.json)

agents.ocr-reader: Batch multimodal OCR for low-confidence pages (reads images via Read tool)
agents.content-writer: Generates thematic Markdown content from OCR text

skills.book-capture: Activates when user mentions capturing a book, Kindle screenshots, book OCR, or book-to-markdown conversion
